news.title:
Castrol India Ltd held its 48th AGM on 30 March 2026 via video conferencing, attended by 74 shareholders.
Key highlights include a proposed final dividend of ₹5.25/share, increased revenue, PAT, and discussions on industry challenges.
news.summary:
Castrol India Ltd held its 48th AGM on 30 March 2026 via video conferencing, attended by 74 shareholders.
Key highlights include a proposed final dividend of ₹5.25/share, increased revenue, PAT, and discussions on industry challenges.

news.title:
REC, PFC, Castrol India, and India Glycols announce record dates for dividend payouts.
India Glycols offers Rs 7.50/share, Castrol Rs 5.25/share, PFC Rs 3.25/share, REC Rs 3.20/share dividends.
news.summary:
REC, PFC, Castrol India, and India Glycols announce record dates for dividend payouts.
India Glycols offers Rs 7.50/share, Castrol Rs 5.25/share, PFC Rs 3.25/share, REC Rs 3.20/share dividends.

news.title:
Castrol India to attend 'Chasing Growth 2026' conference on 24 Feb 2026.
Event includes one-on-one and group interactions with analysts and investors.
news.summary:
Castrol India to attend 'Chasing Growth 2026' conference on 24 Feb 2026.
Event includes one-on-one and group interactions with analysts and investors.

news.title:
Castrol India expects Industrial Business to outgrow Automotive by 2030.
Recommends final dividend of INR 5.25/share, totaling INR 8.75 for 2023.
news.summary:
Castrol India expects Industrial Business to outgrow Automotive by 2030.
Recommends final dividend of INR 5.25/share, totaling INR 8.75 for 2023.

news.title:
Castrol India reports FY2025 revenue growth of 7% to Rs.5,722 Cr.
The company focuses on EV market and supply chain localization.
news.summary:
Castrol India reports FY2025 revenue growth of 7% to Rs.5,722 Cr.
The company focuses on EV market and supply chain localization.

news.title:
Castrol India is trialing immersion coolants for data centers, signaling growth potential.
Management highlights this as a significant opportunity during recent concall updates.
news.summary:
Castrol India is trialing immersion coolants for data centers, signaling growth potential.
Management highlights this as a significant opportunity during recent concall updates.

news.title:
Castrol India's Q4 net profit fell 9.9% YoY to ₹244 crore despite a 6.4% revenue rise to ₹1,440 crore.
FY25 revenue hit ₹5,722 crore, with EBITDA up 5% and volumes up 8%. Final dividend declared at ₹5.25/share.
news.summary:
Castrol India's Q4 net profit fell 9.9% YoY to ₹244 crore despite a 6.4% revenue rise to ₹1,440 crore.
FY25 revenue hit ₹5,722 crore, with EBITDA up 5% and volumes up 8%. Final dividend declared at ₹5.25/share.

news.title:
Castrol India board approved Q4, annual 2025 results; final dividend Rs 5.25/share.
Record date for dividend is 23 Mar 2026; AGM set for 30 Mar 2026.
news.summary:
Castrol India board approved Q4, annual 2025 results; final dividend Rs 5.25/share.
Record date for dividend is 23 Mar 2026; AGM set for 30 Mar 2026.

news.title:
Castrol India schedules Q4 FY25 earnings call on 4 Feb 2026, 12-1 PM IST.
Management will discuss financial performance, strategy, and host Q&A session.
news.summary:
Castrol India schedules Q4 FY25 earnings call on 4 Feb 2026, 12-1 PM IST.
Management will discuss financial performance, strategy, and host Q&A session.

news.title:
HPCL and Castrol India sign MoU to develop RRBO ecosystem.
Re-refining can recover 70-80% base oil, reducing energy use; feasibility study planned.
news.summary:
HPCL and Castrol India sign MoU to develop RRBO ecosystem.
Re-refining can recover 70-80% base oil, reducing energy use; feasibility study planned.

news.title:
Castrol India Ltd's board to meet on 3 Feb 2026 to review FY25 financials.
Meeting will also consider recommendation of dividend for FY25, if any.
news.summary:
Castrol India Ltd's board to meet on 3 Feb 2026 to review FY25 financials.
Meeting will also consider recommendation of dividend for FY25, if any.

news.title:
Saugata Basuray appointed interim CEO of Castrol India after MD's exit.
Permanent replacement for Castrol India's top role is yet to be announced.
news.summary:
Saugata Basuray appointed interim CEO of Castrol India after MD's exit.
Permanent replacement for Castrol India's top role is yet to be announced.

news.title:
IndusInd Bank faces SFIO probe on derivative trades and accounting issues. Castrol India sees open offer at ₹194.04/share post indirect acquisition.
KNR Constructions to sell stakes in road SPVs for ₹1,543.2 Cr. Ola Electric secures ₹366.8 Cr PLI incentive for FY25.
news.summary:
IndusInd Bank faces SFIO probe on derivative trades and accounting issues. Castrol India sees open offer at ₹194.04/share post indirect acquisition.
KNR Constructions to sell stakes in road SPVs for ₹1,543.2 Cr. Ola Electric secures ₹366.8 Cr PLI incentive for FY25.

news.title:
Motion JVCo, Stonepeak, and CPP Investment Board offer to acquire 26% stake in Castrol India.
The open offer involves purchasing 25.71 crore shares at ₹194.04 per share.
news.summary:
Motion JVCo, Stonepeak, and CPP Investment Board offer to acquire 26% stake in Castrol India.
The open offer involves purchasing 25.71 crore shares at ₹194.04 per share.

news.title: Castrol India announces an open offer to acquire a 26% stake in the company.
news.summary: Castrol India announces an open offer to acquire a 26% stake in the company.

news.title: Castrol India shares surged 8% after bp agreed to sell its majority stake in its parent firm.
news.summary: Castrol India shares surged 8% after bp agreed to sell its majority stake in its parent firm.

news.title: Castrol India to proceed with its tender post finalizing a deal with Castrol.
news.summary: Castrol India to proceed with its tender post finalizing a deal with Castrol.

news.title:
BP to sell 65% of Castrol global business to Stonepeak for $6B.
The move is aimed at enabling BP to focus on core operations.
news.summary:
BP to sell 65% of Castrol global business to Stonepeak for $6B.
The move is aimed at enabling BP to focus on core operations.

news.title:
MSTC, PTC India, and Castrol India lead small-cap dividend stocks with yields over 6%.
Axis Securities highlights MSTC's 8% yield, followed by PTC India and Castrol India at 7%.
news.summary:
MSTC, PTC India, and Castrol India lead small-cap dividend stocks with yields over 6%.
Axis Securities highlights MSTC's 8% yield, followed by PTC India and Castrol India at 7%.

news.title:
Castrol India shareholders earned a 16% CAGR over 5 years, though the share price rose only 68% compared to market's 163%.
TSR for Castrol India was 114%, driven by dividends. Despite a 4.5% loss in the past year, long-term fundamentals show growth potential.
news.summary:
Castrol India shareholders earned a 16% CAGR over 5 years, though the share price rose only 68% compared to market's 163%.
TSR for Castrol India was 114%, driven by dividends. Despite a 4.5% loss in the past year, long-term fundamentals show growth potential.
